revision.text:
== Duplicate QIDs Report ==
This page lists all Wikidata QIDs that are linked from multiple pages.
'''Total QID sets with duplicates: 0'''
=== Summary Table ===
{| class="wikitable sortable" |- ! # !! QID !! Count !! Pages |}
=== Detailed Breakdown ===

== Duplicate QIDs Report ==
This page lists all Wikidata QIDs that are linked from multiple pages.
'''Total QID sets with duplicates: 36'''
=== Summary Table ===
{| class="wikitable sortable" |- ! # !! QID !! Count !! Pages |- | 1 || Q11381860 || 2 || [[Kami-Kamikawa Sumiyoshi Shrine]], [[Kami-Kamikawa Sumiyoshi Shrine (Q11381860)]] |- | 2 || Q11427995 || 2 || [[Tsutsumine Shrine]], [[Tsutsumine Shrine (Q11427995)]] |- | 3 || Q11438318 || 2 || [[Takeokami Shrine]], [[Takeokami Shrine (Q11438318)]] |- | 4 || Q11493040 || 2 || [[Ogami Shrine, Kishiwada]], [[Okami Shrine (Kishiwada)]] |- | 5 || Q11508454 || 2 || [[Japan Law School]], [[Nihon Law School]] |- | 6 || Q11516220 || 2 || [[Tsukiyomi-no-Miya (Naiku)]], [[Tsukiyomi-no-Miya (Naikū)]] |- | 7 || Q11533249 || 2 || [[Hayashi Shrine (Akashi)]], [[Hayashi Shrine (Akashi) (Q11533249)]] |- | 8 || Q11572730 || 2 || [[Tamanooya Shrine]], [[Tamanooya Shrine (Q11572730)]] |- | 9 || Q11659204 || 2 || [[Oyama Shrine (Tateyama)]], [[Oyama Shrine (Tateyama) (Q11659204)]] |- | 10 || Q11659237 || 2 || [[Ogami Shrine (Tonami City)]], [[Ogami Shrine (Tonami City) (Q11659237)]] |- | 11 || Q11669105 || 2 || [[Takamefu Shrine]], [[Takamefu Shrine (Q11669105)]] |- | 12 || Q11672588 || 2 || [[Takashino Shrine]], [[Takashino Shrine (Q11672588)]] |- | 13 || Q135038838 || 2 || [[Taka- Shrine]], [[Taka- Shrine (Q135038838)]] |- | 14 || Q135038846 || 2 || [[Sakino Shrine]], [[Sakino Shrine (Q135038846)]] |- | 15 || Q135038958 || 2 || [[Taimayamaguchi Shrine]], [[Taimayamaguchi Shrine (Q135038958)]] |- | 16 || Q135038967 || 2 || [[Takamakishino Shrine]], [[Takamakishino Shrine (Q135038967)]] |- | 17 || Q135038969 || 2 || [[Takamanoyamasatawono Shrine]], [[Takamanoyamasatawono Shrine (Q135038969)]] |- | 18 || Q135038973 || 2 || [[Takahokono Shrine]], [[Takahokono Shrine (Q135038973)]] |- | 19 || Q135038981 || 2 || [[Takatsunono Shrine]], [[Takatsunono Shrine (Q135038981)]] |- | 20 || Q135038987 || 2 || [[Tsurukinushino Shrine]], [[Tsurukinushino Shrine (Q135038987)]] |- | 21 || Q135039001 || 2 || [[Takayaaheno Shrine]], [[Takayaaheno Shrine (Q135039001)]] |- | 22 || Q135039022 || 2 || [[Takinomotono Shrine]], [[Takinomotono Shrine (Q135039022)]] |- | 23 || Q135039030 || 2 || [[Taketano Shrine]], [[Taketano Shrine (Q135039030)]] |- | 24 || Q135039109 || 2 || [[Takayano Shrine]], [[Takayano Shrine (Q135039109)]] |- | 25 || Q135039125 || 2 || [[Takamiyano Shrine]], [[Takamiyano Shrine (Q135039125)]] |- | 26 || Q135039126 || 2 || [[Takamiyaohomorino Shrine]], [[Takamiyaohomorino Shrine (Q135039126)]] |- | 27 || Q135039152 || 2 || [[Tachibino Shrine]], [[Tachibino Shrine (Q135039152)]] |- | 28 || Q135039200 || 2 || [[Sumuchisoneno Shrine]], [[Sumuchisoneno Shrine (Q135039200)]] |- | 29 || Q135098832 || 2 || [[Tamatsurano Shrine]], [[Tamatsurano Shrine (Q135098832)]] |- | 30 || Q135098897 || 2 || [[Tameno Shrine]], [[Tameno Shrine (Q135098897)]] |- | 31 || Q22120029 || 2 || [[Hayashi Shrine (Tonami)]], [[Hayashi Shrine (Tonami) (Q22120029)]] |- | 32 || Q43594646 || 2 || [[Takechino Miagata Shrine]], [[Takechino Miagata Shrine (Q43594646)]] |- | 33 || Q48757073 || 2 || [[Tada Shrine (Tabuto Shrine)]], [[Tada Shrine (Tabuto Shrine) (Q48757073)]] |- | 34 || Q54153264 || 2 || [[Tanakurahiko Shrine]], [[Tanakurahiko Shrine (Q54153264)]] |- | 35 || Q56352076 || 2 || [[Sawawachigi Shrine]], [[Sawawachigi Shrine (Q56352076)]] |- | 36 || Q650253 || 2 || [[Takamahiko Shrine]], [[Takamahiko Shrine (Q650253)]] |}

== Duplicate QIDs Report ==
This page lists all Wikidata QIDs that are linked from multiple pages.
'''Total QID sets with duplicates: 3'''
=== Summary Table ===
{| class="wikitable sortable" |- ! # !! QID !! Count !! Pages |- | 1 || Q11493040 || 2 || [[Ogami Shrine, Kishiwada]], [[Okami Shrine (Kishiwada)]] |- | 2 || Q11508454 || 2 || [[Japan Law School]], [[Nihon Law School]] |- | 3 || Q11516220 || 2 || [[Tsukiyomi-no-Miya (Naiku)]], [[Tsukiyomi-no-Miya (Naikū)]] |}

revision.comment: Text replacement - "Okami Shrine (Kishiwada)" to "Ogami Shrine, Kishiwada"
revision.text:

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "Japan Law School" to "Nihon Law School"
revision.text:
== Duplicate QIDs Report ==
This page lists all Wikidata QIDs that are linked from multiple pages.

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Immanuelle%2FDuplicate_QIDs here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24796114356|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Immanuelle%2FDuplicate_QIDs for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24796114356|commit triggered pipeline]] --> == Duplicate QIDs Report ==
